chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-537 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.2728/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection No.13 & 26. 3. For order on CMA No.2729/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 12th February 2024 Petitioner present in person. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Petitioner undertakes to comply with office objections before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Heard petitioner in person, who could not satisfy this Court as to maintainability of this petition, as prima facie it appears that he is seeking directions of this Court to the learned Single Judge of this Court to proceed and conclude Civil Suit No.1312/2017 within two months and to hear the matter on weekly basis. Such directions cannot be issued in a Constitutional Petition to the learned Single Judge of this Court, who cease of the matter, however, petitioner will be at liberty to pursue the aforesaid suit, whereas, it is expected that the concern learned Single Judge will decide the same at an early date after hearing the parties in accordance with law. Petition stands dismissed in limine in above terms. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
